TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Gjorge Ivanov = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas 5 jiyax 2 ka Gjorge Ivanov ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Macedonia ta sayang o kiya ka Gjorge Ivanov, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 5 jiyax 12 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019. = Gjorge Ivanov = Gjorge Ivanov (Kari Makedon: –É–ĺ—Ä–≥–Ķ –ė–≤–į–Ĺ–ĺ–≤, Gjorge Ivanov, kngkawas 1960 idas 5 diyax 2-) Tudaya Makedon brah soto, rmirih Makedon Pnsliyan Kcka Keming Minjoku Pskngalan Mincu Tang mbiyax mangan soto. Gjorge Ivanov pa mntuting Valandovo, kngkawas 1990 brah cida ngalan kcka Jugoslavija Kyosangto Mbbiyax Twan mpdudul niya. Kngkawas 2009, uka tangpay ka Gjorge Ivanov, wada splawa rmirih knbeyhing balay cngtang Makedon- Makedon Pnsliyan Kcka Keming Minjoku Pskngalan Mincu Tang, tumal seyngkyo soto, kiya mi wada kasi mbiyax mangal soto. Kngkawas 2014 idas 4 mniq knbeyhing seyngkyo mbiyax mangal soto dungan. Kndusan niya Qridin Gjorge Ivanov ka Maja Ivanova, msdungus ddha dha pa niqan taxa laqi dha, Ivan ka hangan niya. Ppatan PpatanśõłÁĪć ¬∑ –¶–ł–≤–ł–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ–Ņ—ą—ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ ( "Kongmin Syakay") ("Mincu Mniq Ka Wisu Pkdha Syakay: Makedon Mwosu", Democracy in the divided societes: the Macedonian Model) ",Democracy in the divided societes: the Macedonian Model) ¬∑
S.PHON: = g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ma ¶…ôdonia ta sajaŇč o kija ka g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ńßis s…ô ¶ond and tńß…ô last p…ĺ…ôsid…ôntial t…ô…ĺm …ônd…ôd on ** maj ****. = g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* = g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* (ka…ĺi mak…ôdon: ***** ******, g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano*, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *-) tudaja mak…ôdon b…ĺańß soto, …ĺmi…ĺińß mak…ôdon pnslijan k ¶ka k…ômiŇč min…üoku pskŇčalan min ¶u taŇč mbijax maŇčan soto. g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* pa mntutiŇč *alando*o, kŇčkawas **** b…ĺańß ¶ida Ňčalan k ¶ka …üugosla*i…üa kjosaŇčto mbbijax twan mpdudul nija. kŇčkawas ****, uka taŇčpaj ka g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano*, wada splawa …ĺmi…ĺińß knb…ôńßiŇč balaj ¶ŇčtaŇč mak…ôdon- mak…ôdon pnslijan k ¶ka k…ômiŇč min…üoku pskŇčalan min ¶u taŇč, tumal s…ôŇčkjo soto, kija mi wada kasi mbijax maŇčal soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * mniq knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo mbijax maŇčal soto duŇčan. kndusan nija q…ĺidin g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* ka ma…üa i*ano*a, msduŇčus ddńßa dńßa pa niqan taxa laqi dńßa, i*an ka ńßaŇčan nija. ppatan ppatan** * ******* ********* ( "koŇčmin sjakaj") ("min ¶u mniq ka wisu pkdńßa sjakaj: mak…ôdon mwosu", d…ômo ¶…ĺa ¶j in tńß…ô di*id…ôd so ¶i…ôt…ôs: tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian mod…ôl) ",d…ômo ¶…ĺa ¶j in tńß…ô di*id…ôd so ¶i…ôt…ôs: tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian mod…ôl) *
S.FORM: = Gjorge Ivanov = Mntucing hngkawas 1960 idas 5 jiyax 2 ka Gjorge Ivanov ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Macedonia ta sayang o kiya ka Gjorge Ivanov, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 5 jiyax 12 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. His second and the last presidential term ended on 12 May 2019. = Gjorge Ivanov = Gjorge Ivanov (Kari Makedon: –É–ĺ—Ä–≥–Ķ –ė–≤–į–Ĺ–ĺ–≤, Gjorge Ivanov, kngkawas 1960 idas 5 diyax 2-) Tudaya Makedon brah soto, rmirih Makedon Pnsliyan Kcka Keming Minjoku Pskngalan Mincu Tang mbiyax mangan soto. Gjorge Ivanov pa mntuting Valandovo, kngkawas 1990 brah cida ngalan kcka Jugoslavija Kyosangto Mbbiyax Twan mpdudul niya. Kngkawas 2009, uka tangpay ka Gjorge Ivanov, wada splawa rmirih knbeyhing balay cngtang Makedon- Makedon Pnsliyan Kcka Keming Minjoku Pskngalan Mincu Tang, tumal seyngkyo soto, kiya mi wada kasi mbiyax mangal soto. Kngkawas 2014 idas 4 mniq knbeyhing seyngkyo mbiyax mangal soto dungan. Kndusan niya Qridin Gjorge Ivanov ka Maja Ivanova, msdungus ddha dha pa niqan taxa laqi dha, Ivan ka hangan niya. Ppatan PpatanśõłÁĪć ¬∑ –¶–ł–≤–ł–Ľ–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ–Ņ—ą—ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ ( "Kongmin Syakay") ("Mincu Mniq Ka Wisu Pkdha Syakay: Makedon Mwosu", Democracy in the divided societes: the Macedonian Model) ",Democracy in the divided societes: the Macedonian Model) ¬∑
S.PHON: = g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan ma ¶…ôdonia ta sajaŇč o kija ka g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ńßis s…ô ¶ond and tńß…ô last p…ĺ…ôsid…ôntial t…ô…ĺm …ônd…ôd on ** maj ****. = g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* = g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* (ka…ĺi mak…ôdon: ***** ******, g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano*, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax *-) tudaja mak…ôdon b…ĺańß soto, …ĺmi…ĺińß mak…ôdon pnslijan k ¶ka k…ômiŇč min…üoku pskŇčalan min ¶u taŇč mbijax maŇčan soto. g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* pa mntutiŇč *alando*o, kŇčkawas **** b…ĺańß ¶ida Ňčalan k ¶ka …üugosla*i…üa kjosaŇčto mbbijax twan mpdudul nija. kŇčkawas ****, uka taŇčpaj ka g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano*, wada splawa …ĺmi…ĺińß knb…ôńßiŇč balaj ¶ŇčtaŇč mak…ôdon- mak…ôdon pnslijan k ¶ka k…ômiŇč min…üoku pskŇčalan min ¶u taŇč, tumal s…ôŇčkjo soto, kija mi wada kasi mbijax maŇčal soto. kŇčkawas **** idas * mniq knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo mbijax maŇčal soto duŇčan. kndusan nija q…ĺidin g…üo…ĺg…ô i*ano* ka ma…üa i*ano*a, msduŇčus ddńßa dńßa pa niqan taxa laqi dńßa, i*an ka ńßaŇčan nija. ppatan ppatan** * ******* ********* ( "koŇčmin sjakaj") ("min ¶u mniq ka wisu pkdńßa sjakaj: mak…ôdon mwosu", d…ômo ¶…ĺa ¶j in tńß…ô di*id…ôd so ¶i…ôt…ôs: tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian mod…ôl) ",d…ômo ¶…ĺa ¶j in tńß…ô di*id…ôd so ¶i…ôt…ôs: tńß…ô ma ¶…ôdonian mod…ôl) *
